caption: A large assembly of people is seated in a tiered chamber, likely a legislative hall, with rows of brown wooden desks and benches. The attendees are primarily dressed in traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas and colorful sarees in shades of pink, orange, and blue. Many individuals are seated and listening, while some appear to be conversing or shifting in their seats. A person in a blue jacket is seen standing and operating a camera or recording device in the center of the room. Across the sequence, the scene remains largely static, capturing a wide shot of the crowd. There are slight variations in the postures of the people as they move slightly, but the overall composition and the positions of the individuals remain consistent throughout the short clip. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
